note: MEASURED baseline — real agent run over all 103 frozen corpus cases (blind, neutralized filenames), 2026-06-07 (QA-8). Replaces the prior SYNTHETIC 32-case snapshot. Model: sonnet (cost-bounded); a production opus run would likely score higher — re-baseline on opus before relying on the gate for production. Weak spots surfaced: AuthN/AuthZ recall (J=0.25, 9 FN) and SSRF benign over-flagging (5 FP, all py-ssrf*). See docs/qa/20260607/full-baseline-report.md.
